mapper.select: SELECT SEQ_SCHEDULE.NEXTVAL AS SCHNUM FROM DUAL
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO SCHEDULE(SCH_NUM, SCH_TITLE, SCH_START, SCH_END, SCH_COLOR, USER_NUM) VALUES(#{schNum}, #{schTitle}, #{schStart}, #{schEnd}, #{schColor}, #{userNum})
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM SCHEDULE WHERE USER_NUM = #{userNum} ORDER BY SCH_START ASC
mapper.update: UPDATE SCHEDULE SET SCH_TITLE = #{schTitle}, SCH_START = #{schStart}, SCH_END = #{schEnd}, SCH_COLOR = #{schColor} WHERE SCH_NUM = #{schNum}
